completed: Fixed Co-Curricular API 400 Bad Request by standardizing departmentId handling
Enabled co-curricular data visibility by adding 'not_submitted' and 'rejected' to NodueApproval schema
Fixed logical precedence bug in batch initiation year calculation
Updated student portal Status.jsx to correctly filter and sort co-curricular items
Resolved duplicate schema index warning in EmailLog model
pending: Verify end-to-end clearance flow with actual coordinators

decisions.context: Co-curricular items were not appearing because 'not_submitted' wasn't a valid DB status.
decisions.decision: Expanded NodueApproval enum to accommodate the co-curricular lifecycle (not_submitted -> pending -> approved).
decisions.trade_offs: Requires any active batches to be re-initiated to correctly populate the new statuses.
